alerts.title: Iran nuclear breakout window narrows to 1-2 weeks amid deal uncertainty
alerts.summary: US intelligence assesses Iran's uranium enrichment at 60% U-235 with breakout time estimated at 1-2 weeks, per global_metrics nuclear headlines. CIA Director Ratcliffe warned Trump that Iran does not intend to honor nuclear commitments despite ceasefire framework (telegram, Axios). Represents acute proliferation risk if diplomatic deal collapses.

alerts.title: Trump threatens to seize Iran oil, gas sectors; warns of 'very hard' strikes tonight
alerts.summary: President Trump publicly vowed via NPR to strike Iran 'very hard tonight' and stated intention to take over Iranian oil and gas sectors, per incidents feed. Statement escalates rhetoric amid fragile US-Iran ceasefire and contradicts diplomatic messaging from White House negotiators.

alerts.title: Iran warns Israeli Lebanon strikes void US ceasefire agreement; threats escalate
alerts.summary: Iranian Foreign Minister Araghchi declared that any Israeli attack on Lebanon violates the US-Iran agreement (IranWire, Al Jazeera, incidents feed). Iran asserts US bears responsibility for Israeli actions. Signals Tehran may use Israeli-Hezbollah escalation as pretext to abandon nuclear commitments and restart hostilities.

alerts.title: USS Florida submarine deployed to Persian Gulf amid elevated threat posture
alerts.summary: USS Florida (Virginia-class submarine) positioned in Persian Gulf per assets feed, joining carrier strike groups across Red Sea, Arabian Sea, and Mediterranean. Deployment reflects US force readiness against Iranian assets and proxy escalation risks as ceasefire terms remain contested.

alerts.title: Global sentiment on US-Iran deal remains mixed; Trump messaging dominates discourse
alerts.summary: US sentiment analysis shows 60% positive / 34% negative ratio with 'trump', 'iran', 'deal', and 'peace' as top trending terms (sentiment feed). Persistent focus on Trump statements and deal framework ambiguity suggests public confidence in agreement remains fragile despite White House claims of breakthrough.

analysis_note: US-Iran ceasefire framework announced but unraveling rapidly: Trump rhetoric threatens military strikes, Iran questions nuclear commitment credibility, Israeli-Hezbollah escalation undermines agreement terms, and nuclear breakout timeline now critically compressed to 1-2 weeks—diplomatic window closing fast.
